welcomeSubtitle: Choose a name for your company
classicModeDesc: Uses traditional terms: agents, skills, etc.
orgModeDesc: Uses company metaphor: employees, hiring, etc.
templatesSubtitle: Choose preset agents to get started (optional)
apiSubtitle: Enter your API credentials to connect to an AI model
apiSaveError: Failed to save API settings. Please try again.
tour.step1Desc: Select and chat with your agents (employees) here.
tour.step2Desc: Start working by sending messages to your agent.
tour.step3Desc: Create new agents to expand your team.
tour.step4Desc: Change API keys, themes, language, and more.
tour.step5Desc: Build teams where multiple agents collaborate.
